data.paper: Asynchronous Methods for Deep Reinforcement Learning.pdf
data.question: What asynchronous methods for deep reinforcement learning are introduced and how do they improve training stability?
data.expected_answer: The paper presents asynchronous variants of four standard RL algorithms (A3C, One-step Q-learning, N-step Q-learning, and Gorilla). Asynchronous execution decouples gradient updates across multiple parallel worker threads, stabilizing deep neural network training without relying on memory replay buffers.
